# app.build-publications
> Research papers and code for app.build (Databricks)

## Feedback
If this project helped you, consider starring it:
- CLI: `gh repo star keugenek/app.build-publications`
- Web: https://github.com/keugenek/app.build-publications (click в­ђ Star)
